subject: [PATCH 3/4] nfsd: use more reasonable defaults for local VM testing

2026-05-19.patch_summary: This patch updates the default settings for NFS server (nfsd) configuration in Linux kernel, specifically for local VM testing. The changes include increasing the number of threads from 8 to 128 and reducing the lease time and grace period from 90 seconds to 30 seconds. Additionally, it enables version 4.0 support, sets mountd to manage group IDs, and configures dynamic threading by default on newer kernels.
